## IMQOptions.watcherCheckDelay property

Delay period (in milliseconds) between watcher availability checks. Used to ensure at least one watcher is available for queue operations.

 {<!-- -->number<!-- -->}

**Signature:**

```typescript
watcherCheckDelay?: number;
```
